function.name: web_fetch
function.description: Fetch the content of a web page URL and return it as markdown. Uses a headless browser to render JavaScript-heavy pages. This tool always runs in the background. You will be notified automatically when the result is ready — do NOT poll, read output files, or wait for the result. Continue responding to the user.

url.description: The URL to fetch (must be a fully-formed URL with http:// or https://)
